summary.en-US: Syncs the current Google Labs session to a Flow2API server after the user provides only the Flow2API base URL.
summary.zh-CN: 用户只需填写一个 Flow2API Base URL，扩展就会把当前 Google Labs 登录态同步到对应服务。

description.en-US: Flow2API Token Updater reads the Google Labs session cookie from labs.google, auto-discovers the plugin connection token from an already logged-in Flow2API console on the same browser after the user authorizes a Base URL, and syncs the session to that Flow2API server. It supports Chromium browsers and Firefox-based browsers such as Firefox and Zen.
description.zh-CN: Flow2API Token Updater 会从 labs.google 读取当前登录态；当用户填写 Base URL 并授权访问该域名后，扩展会在同一浏览器内自动读取已登录的 Flow2API 控制台配置，并把登录态同步到该 Flow2API 服务。它支持 Chromium 以及 Firefox / Zen 等 Firefox 系浏览器。

version.approval_notes: This extension accesses cookies for https://labs.google/ to read the __Secure-next-auth.session-token value. After the user enters a Flow2API base URL and grants access to that site, the extension may read the local admin session state from the user's already logged-in Flow2API console in the same browser in order to auto-discover the plugin connection token. The extracted Google Labs session token is then sent only to the user's own Flow2API endpoint at /api/plugin/update-token. No analytics, advertising, telemetry, or third-party tracking endpoints are included. The Base URL, discovered connection token, and local logs are stored only in browser local storage per profile. Privacy policy: https://banana.rematrixed.com/privacy
